name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what is the feature and what problem does it solve? -->


## Motivation

<!-- Why is this important? Who benefits and how often? -->


## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe how you imagine the feature working. Include UI mockups or wireframes if you have them. -->


## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed approach better? -->


## Affected area(s)

- [ ] Inbox / thread list
- [ ] Thread view
- [ ] AI sidebar / chat
- [ ] Compose panel
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] New provider integration
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar features in other apps, relevant issues, prior discussion, etc. -->
